items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 86% of users experienced issues with app connectivity, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance battery life
items.rationale: 7 users out of 505 reported negative experiences with battery life, indicating a potential issue.

items.title: Optimize setup process
items.rationale: 84 users out of 505 reported negative experiences with the setup process, which is a significant pain point.

items.title: Address customer service concerns
items.rationale: 37 users out of 505 reported negative experiences with customer service, indicating a need for improvement.

items.title: Investigate compatibility issues
items.rationale: 16 users out of 505 reported negative experiences with compatibility, which may be a significant issue for some users.
